[textmode.js](../../../../../index.md) / [media](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeVideo](../../TextmodeVideo.md) / play

# Method: play()

```ts
play(): Promise<void>;
```

Start video playback.

## Returns

`Promise`\<`void`\>

Promise that resolves when playback starts.
